title: Export project code as downloadable archive

requirements.summary: Generate a complete downloadable archive containing all project source code for admin users
acceptanceCriteria: Archive includes all frontend source files from the frontend directory
Archive includes all backend source files (main.mo and any other .mo files)
Archive includes configuration files (package.json, tailwind.config.js, etc.)
Archive is provided in a standard compressed format (zip or tar.gz)
User can download the archive through the interface or receive a download link

file_operations.description: Create admin-only page that allows authorized administrators to export the complete project source code as a downloadable archive. Use the authorization component to ensure only admins can access this page by checking AccessControl.hasPermission for #admin role. Display a button to trigger the archive generation and download, showing loading state during generation and success/error messages. Include instructions about what is included in the export (frontend, backend, configuration files) and what is excluded (node_modules, build artifacts). Verify the authorization component's usage instructions before implementing.

Create a React hook that handles project export logic. Use fetch or the actor to call a backend method that generates and returns the project archive. Handle loading states, errors, and trigger browser download of the returned archive file. Include proper error handling for unauthorized access attempts and network failures.

Add a new admin-only route '/admin/export' that renders the AdminExportPage component. Place this route within the admin section of the router configuration, ensuring it follows the same authentication and authorization patterns as existing admin routes like '/admin/orders'.

Add a navigation link to the Export page in the admin section of the site navigation. This link should only be visible to authenticated admin users. Position it logically within the existing admin navigation items, after the Orders link.
